option.name: fileSummaryMaps
option.value: {"D:/myproject/scf":"{\"/scf-gateway/src/main/java/com/scf/gateway/GatewayApplication.java\":\"This file is a Spring Boot application that serves as a gateway for other services. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather sets up the main entry point for the application.\\n\\n`GatewayApplication`: This is the main class that bootstraps the Spring Boot application and starts the gateway.\\n\\n`main(String[] args)`: This is the main method that runs the Spring Boot application and starts the gateway.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/dto/OutboundTaskReq.java\":\"This file defines a data transfer object (DTO) for an outbound task request in an order management system (OMS).\\n\\n`OutboundTaskReq`: A class that represents the request parameters for an outbound task, including the order ID, warehouse ID, receiver information, and a list of outbound items.\\n\\n`ReceiverInfo`: A nested class within `OutboundTaskReq` that represents the information about the receiver, including the name, phone, and address.\\n\\n`OutboundItem`: A nested class within `OutboundTaskReq` that represents an individual outbound item, including the SKU code and quantity.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/dto/OrderCreateReq.java\":\"This file contains a single class `OrderCreateReq` which represents a request for creating an order. The class has several properties that represent the details of the order, such as the external order ID, receiver information, and a list of SKU items.\\n\\n`OrderCreateReq`: A class that represents a request for creating an order, containing information such as the external order ID, receiver details, and a list of SKU items.\\n\\n`SkuItem`: A nested class within `OrderCreateReq` that represents a single SKU item, containing information such as the SKU code, quantity, and price.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/OmsApplication.java\":\"This file is the main application class for the OMS (Order Management System) application. It is responsible for bootstrapping the Spring Boot application and enabling Feign client support.\\n\\n`OmsApplication`: This is the main application class that bootstraps the Spring Boot application and enables Feign client support.\\n\\n`main(String[] args)`: This is the main entry point of the application, which runs the Spring Boot application.\",\"/scf-isc/src/main/java/com/scf/isc/IscApplication.java\":\"This file is the main application class for a Spring Boot application. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather serves as the entry point for the application.\\n\\nThe file does the following:\\n\\n1. Imports the necessary Spring Boot classes.\\n2. Defines the `IscApplication` class, which is annotated with `@SpringBootApplication`, indicating that it is the main class for a Spring Boot application.\\n3. Provides the `main()` method, which is the entry point for the application and calls the `SpringApplication.run()` method to start the application.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/domain/model/FulfillmentOrder.java\":\"`FulfillmentOrder`: The main aggregate root class that represents a fulfillment order, containing details about the order, receiver information, and various business operations.\\n\\n`addDetail`: Adds a new detail to the fulfillment order and calculates the total amount.\\n`assignWarehouse`: Assigns a warehouse to the fulfillment order and updates its status.\\n`stockLocked`: Locks the stock for the fulfillment order and updates its status.\\n`dispatched`: Marks the fulfillment order as dispatched and updates its status.\\n`cancel`: Cancels the fulfillment order and updates its status.\\n\\nThis file defines the `FulfillmentOrder` domain model, which represents a fulfillment order in the Order Management System (OMS). It includes the order details, receiver information, and various business operations that can be performed on the order, such as assigning a warehouse, locking the stock, dispatching the order, and canceling the order.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/application/service/FulfillmentOrderApplicationService.java\":\"This file contains the implementation of the `FulfillmentOrderApplicationService` class, which is responsible for managing the creation, cancellation, and retrieval of fulfillment orders in an Order Management System (OMS) application.\\n\\n`FulfillmentOrderApplicationService`: This class is the application service responsible for handling the business logic related to fulfillment orders, including creating new orders, canceling existing orders, and retrieving order information.\\n\\n`createOrder`: This function creates a new fulfillment order, assigns it to an optimal warehouse, locks the required stock, and dispatches the order to the Warehouse Management System (WMS).\\n\\n`cancelOrder`: This function cancels an existing fulfillment order, releases the locked stock, and persists the updated order state.\\n\\n`getOrder`: This function retrieves a fulfillment order by its ID.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/client/TmsClient.java\":\"This file is a Spring Cloud Feign client interface for the Transportation Management System (TMS) service. It provides a single function to estimate the route for a given request, including the delivery time and cost.\\n\\n`TmsClient`: A Feign client interface for interacting with the TMS service.\\n\\n`estimateRoute`: Estimates the route for a given request, returning a list of `RouteEstimateDTO` objects containing the delivery time and cost.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/model/Order.java\":\"This file defines a data model for an Order in an Order Management System (OMS).\\n\\n`Order`: A class that represents an order, containing information such as the order ID, external order ID, status, receiver details, warehouse ID, and a list of order items.\\n\\n`OrderItem`: A nested class within the `Order` class that represents an individual item in the order, containing the SKU code and quantity.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any functions, but rather defines the structure and properties of the `Order` and `OrderItem` classes, which can be used to represent and manage orders in the OMS.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/service/OmsService.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `OmsService`, which is a service class responsible for the core business logic of the Order Management System (OMS). The file does not contain any other classes.\\n\\n`OmsService`: Provides the main functionality for creating, scheduling, dispatching, and canceling fulfillment orders, as well as managing the associated order details and logs.\\n\\n`createOrder`: Creates a new fulfillment order, including the order entity, order details, and persisting the data (in a mock database).\\n\\n`scheduleOrder`: Handles the scheduling of a fulfillment order, including checking available-to-promise (ATP) stock, selecting a warehouse, updating the order status, and locking the stock.\\n\\n`lockStock`: Locks the required stock for a fulfillment order by calling the ISC (Inventory Service Client) client.\\n\\n`dispatchOrder`: Dispatches the fulfillment order to the WMS (Warehouse Management System) by creating an outbound task.\\n\\n`cancelOrder`: Cancels a fulfillment order, including unlocking the stock if it was previously locked.\\n\\n`getOrder`: Retrieves a specific fulfillment order by its ID.\\n\\n`getOrders`: Retrieves a list of all fulfillment orders (from the mock database).\\n\\n`logOrderAction`: Records an order action and its associated details in the order log.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/dto/RouteEstimateDTO.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`RouteEstimateDTO`: A data transfer object (DTO) that represents the result of a route estimation, including the warehouse ID, estimated cost, and estimated time.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions. It is a simple DTO class that holds data related to a route estimation.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/controller/OmsController.java\":\"This file contains a Spring Boot REST controller class for managing order fulfillment operations in an Order Management System (OMS).\\n\\n`OmsController`: A REST controller class that provides endpoints for creating, canceling, and retrieving orders.\\n\\n`submitOrder`: Submits a new order and returns the order ID.\\n`cancelOrder`: Cancels an existing order and returns a boolean indicating the success of the operation.\\n`getOrder`: Retrieves the details of an order by its ID.\\n`getOrders`: Retrieves a list of orders (mocked implementation).\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/domain/service/RoutingDecisionDomainService.java\":\"This file contains a single class and several functions:\\n\\n`RoutingDecisionDomainService`: A service class that calculates the optimal warehouse for fulfilling an order based on the available stock at different warehouses.\\n\\n`calculateOptimalWarehouse`: This function takes a `FulfillmentOrder` object as input, queries the available stock for the required SKUs, and returns the warehouse ID that can fulfill the order.\\n\\nThe file implements the logic for the \\\"Intelligent Sourcing and Routing\\\" component of the Order Management System (OMS), as described in the corresponding research paper. The main functionality is to determine the optimal warehouse to fulfill a given order based on the available stock at different warehouses.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/model/OmsOrderLog.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `OmsOrderLog`, which is a data model for an order fulfillment log in an Order Management System (OMS).\\n\\n`OmsOrderLog`: A data model representing a log entry for an order fulfillment process, including information about the order, status changes, actions taken, and the operator responsible.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions, but rather defines the properties and data structure of the `OmsOrderLog` class, which is likely used in other parts of the OMS application to track and record the lifecycle of orders.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/domain/model/FulfillmentOrderDetail.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`FulfillmentOrderDetail`: This class represents a single line item in a fulfillment order, containing information about the SKU (Stock Keeping Unit), quantity, and price.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any functions, but rather defines the properties and a constructor for the `FulfillmentOrderDetail` class, which is used to model the details of a fulfillment order in the context of an Order Management System (OMS).\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/dto/StockQueryReq.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`StockQueryReq`: A data transfer object (DTO) that represents the request parameters for a stock query operation.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any functions. It defines a DTO class that holds the necessary information for querying the stock of a set of SKUs in a specific warehouse or across all warehouses.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/dto/SkuStockDTO.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`SkuStockDTO`: A data transfer object (DTO) that represents the stock information for a specific SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) in a particular warehouse.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any functions. It is a simple DTO class that holds the following information:\\n- `skuCode`: The code or identifier of the SKU.\\n- `availableQuantity`: The available quantity of the SKU in the warehouse.\\n- `warehouseId`: The identifier of the warehouse where the SKU is stored.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/model/OmsFulfillmentOrder.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`OmsFulfillmentOrder`: This class represents the entity for a fulfillment order in the Order Management System (OMS), corresponding to the `oms_fulfillment_order` database table.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions. It defines the properties and attributes of the `OmsFulfillmentOrder` class, which include the order number, external number, parent order ID, fulfillment status, receiver information, warehouse details, logistics provider, tracking number, total amount, and various timestamps related to the order\\u0027s lifecycle.\",\"/scf-wms/src/main/java/com/scf/wms/WmsApplication.java\":\"This file is the main entry point for a Spring Boot application called \\\"WmsApplication\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather serves as the starting point for the application. When the `main()` method is executed, it runs the `SpringApplication.run()` method, which bootstraps the Spring application and starts the embedded web server.\\n\\nThe file serves the following purpose:\\n\\n1. It is annotated with `@SpringBootApplication`, which is a convenience annotation that adds all of the following:\\n - `@Configuration`: Tags the class as a source of bean definitions for the application context.\\n - `@EnableAutoConfiguration`: Tells Spring Boot to start adding beans based on classpath settings, other beans, and various property settings.\\n - `@ComponentScan`: Tells Spring to look for other components, configurations, and services in the `com/scf/wms` package.\\n\\n2. The `main()` method uses Spring Boot\\u0027s `SpringApplication.run()` method to launch an application.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/dto/RouteReq.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`RouteReq`: A data transfer object (DTO) that represents the request parameters for a route estimation service, including the from and to addresses, weight, and volume.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions. It is a simple DTO class that encapsulates the necessary information for a route estimation request.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/domain/model/ReceiverInfo.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`ReceiverInfo`: A value object that represents the information of a receiver, including their name, phone, province, city, district, and detailed address.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any functions, but rather a constructor for the `ReceiverInfo` class that initializes its properties.\\n\\nOverall, this file defines a value object that encapsulates the necessary information about a receiver, which is likely used in the context of an order management system (OMS) domain.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/dto/StockLockReq.java\":\"This file contains a single class `StockLockReq` which represents a request for locking inventory. The class has the following properties:\\n\\n`StockLockReq`: A class that represents a request for locking inventory, including the order ID, warehouse ID, and a list of items to be locked.\\n\\n`LockItem`: A nested class within `StockLockReq` that represents a single item to be locked, including the SKU code and quantity.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions, but rather defines the structure of the `StockLockReq` object, which can be used to represent a request for locking inventory in an order management system.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/dto/OrderCancelReq.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`OrderCancelReq`: A data transfer object (DTO) that represents the request parameters for canceling an order, including the order ID and the reason for cancellation.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions. It is a simple DTO class that encapsulates the necessary information for canceling an order.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/client/WmsClient.java\":\"This file contains a single interface `WmsClient` that serves as a client for the Warehouse Management System (WMS) service.\\n\\n`WmsClient`: An interface that provides a client for interacting with the WMS service, specifically for creating outbound tasks.\\n\\n`createOutboundTask`: A method that sends an `OutboundTaskReq` object to the WMS service to create a new outbound task.\\n\\nThis file is part of the Order Management System (OMS) client and is responsible for communicating with the WMS service to manage outbound tasks.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/model/OmsOrderDetail.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`OmsOrderDetail`: This class represents the details of a fulfillment order, including the order ID, SKU information, quantity, price, split amount, and weight.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions. It is a data model class that represents the structure of the `oms_order_detail` table in the database.\",\"/scf-tms/src/main/java/com/scf/tms/TmsApplication.java\":\"This file is the main entry point for a Spring Boot application called \\\"TMS\\\" (Transportation Management System). It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather sets up the application to run using the `SpringApplication.run()` method.\\n\\nThe file serves the following purpose:\\n\\n1. It is annotated with `@SpringBootApplication`, which is a convenience annotation that adds all of the following:\\n - `@Configuration`: Tags the class as a source of bean definitions for the application context.\\n - `@EnableAutoConfiguration`: Tells Spring Boot to start adding beans based on classpath settings, other beans, and various property settings.\\n - `@ComponentScan`: Tells Spring to look for other components, configurations, and services in the `com/scf/tms` package.\\n\\n2. The `main()` method uses Spring Boot\\u0027s `SpringApplication.run()` method to launch an application.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/client/IscClient.java\":\"This file defines an interface `IscClient` that acts as a client for the Inventory Service Center (ISC) API. The interface provides methods to query available-to-promise (ATP) stock, lock stock, and unlock stock.\\n\\n`IscClient`: An interface that provides methods to interact with the ISC API for stock-related operations.\\n\\n`queryAtp`: Queries the available-to-promise (ATP) stock based on the provided `StockQueryReq`.\\n\\n`lockStock`: Locks the stock based on the provided `StockLockReq`.\\n\\n`unlockStock`: Unlocks the stock based on the provided `StockUnlockReq`.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/domain/repository/FulfillmentOrderRepository.java\":\"This file defines an interface `FulfillmentOrderRepository` that provides methods for managing `FulfillmentOrder` objects.\\n\\n`FulfillmentOrderRepository`: An interface that defines methods for saving, finding by ID, and finding by external ID a `FulfillmentOrder` object.\\n\\n`save(FulfillmentOrder order)`: Saves the given `FulfillmentOrder` object.\\n`findById(String orderId)`: Finds a `FulfillmentOrder` object by its ID.\\n`findByExternalId(String externalId)`: Finds a `FulfillmentOrder` object by its external ID.\",\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/dto/StockUnlockReq.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`StockUnlockReq`: A data transfer object (DTO) that represents a request to unlock stock for an order, containing the order ID and the reason for the unlock.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions. It is a simple DTO class that encapsulates the necessary information for a stock unlock request.\"}"}

option.name: fileSkeletonMaps
option.value: {"D:/myproject/scf":"{\"/scf-gateway/src/main/java/com/scf/gateway/GatewayApplication.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/scf-gateway/src/main/java/com/scf/gateway/GatewayApplication.java\",\"file_name\":\"GatewayApplication.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"main\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String[] args)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"args\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[7,4],[9,5]]}]},\"/scf-isc/src/main/java/com/scf/isc/IscApplication.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/scf-isc/src/main/java/com/scf/isc/IscApplication.java\",\"file_name\":\"IscApplication.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"main\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String[] args)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"args\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[7,4],[9,5]]}]},\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/application/service/FulfillmentOrderApplicationService.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/application/service/FulfillmentOrderApplicationService.java\",\"file_name\":\"FulfillmentOrderApplicationService.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"createOrder\",\"method_parameters\":\"(OrderCreateReq req)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"OrderCreateReq\",\"name\":\"req\"}],\"return_type\":\"String\",\"scope\":[[36,4],[106,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"cancelOrder\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String orderId, String reason)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"orderId\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"reason\"}],\"return_type\":\"Boolean\",\"scope\":[[111,4],[127,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getOrder\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String orderId)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"orderId\"}],\"return_type\":\"FulfillmentOrder\",\"scope\":[[129,4],[131,5]]}]},\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/client/IscClient.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/client/IscClient.java\",\"file_name\":\"IscClient.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"queryAtp\",\"method_parameters\":\"(@RequestBody StockQueryReq req)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"StockQueryReq\",\"name\":\"req\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[25,4],[26,63]]},{\"method_name\":\"lockStock\",\"method_parameters\":\"(@RequestBody StockLockReq req)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"StockLockReq\",\"name\":\"req\"}],\"return_type\":\"Boolean\",\"scope\":[[34,4],[35,53]]},{\"method_name\":\"unlockStock\",\"method_parameters\":\"(@RequestBody StockUnlockReq req)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"StockUnlockReq\",\"name\":\"req\"}],\"return_type\":\"Boolean\",\"scope\":[[43,4],[44,57]]}]},\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/client/TmsClient.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/client/TmsClient.java\",\"file_name\":\"TmsClient.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"estimateRoute\",\"method_parameters\":\"(@RequestBody RouteReq req)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"RouteReq\",\"name\":\"req\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[23,4],[24,68]]}]},\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/client/WmsClient.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/client/WmsClient.java\",\"file_name\":\"WmsClient.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"createOutboundTask\",\"method_parameters\":\"(@RequestBody OutboundTaskReq req)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"OutboundTaskReq\",\"name\":\"req\"}],\"return_type\":\"Boolean\",\"scope\":[[20,4],[21,65]]}]},\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/controller/OmsController.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/controller/OmsController.java\",\"file_name\":\"OmsController.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"submitOrder\",\"method_parameters\":\"(@RequestBody OrderCreateReq req)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"OrderCreateReq\",\"name\":\"req\"}],\"return_type\":\"String\",\"scope\":[[28,4],[31,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"cancelOrder\",\"method_parameters\":\"(@RequestBody OrderCancelReq req)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"OrderCancelReq\",\"name\":\"req\"}],\"return_type\":\"Boolean\",\"scope\":[[39,4],[42,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getOrder\",\"method_parameters\":\"(@PathVariable String orderId)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"orderId\"}],\"return_type\":\"OmsFulfillmentOrder\",\"scope\":[[50,4],[53,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getOrders\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[60,4],[63,5]]}]},\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/domain/model/FulfillmentOrder.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/domain/model/FulfillmentOrder.java\",\"file_name\":\"FulfillmentOrder.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"FulfillmentOrder\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String orderId, String externalOrderId, ReceiverInfo receiverInfo)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"orderId\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"externalOrderId\"},{\"type\":\"ReceiverInfo\",\"name\":\"receiverInfo\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[24,4],[32,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"addDetail\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String skuId, String skuName, Integer quantity, BigDecimal price)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"skuId\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"skuName\"},{\"type\":\"Integer\",\"name\":\"quantity\"},{\"type\":\"BigDecimal\",\"name\":\"price\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[34,4],[37,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"calculateTotalAmount\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[39,4],[43,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"assignWarehouse\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String warehouseId)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"warehouseId\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[46,4],[53,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"stockLocked\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[56,4],[62,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"dispatched\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[65,4],[71,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"cancel\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[74,4],[80,5]]}]},\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/domain/model/FulfillmentOrderDetail.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/domain/model/FulfillmentOrderDetail.java\",\"file_name\":\"FulfillmentOrderDetail.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"FulfillmentOrderDetail\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String skuId, String skuName, Integer quantity, BigDecimal price)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"skuId\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"skuName\"},{\"type\":\"Integer\",\"name\":\"quantity\"},{\"type\":\"BigDecimal\",\"name\":\"price\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[16,4],[21,5]]}]},\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/domain/model/ReceiverInfo.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/domain/model/ReceiverInfo.java\",\"file_name\":\"ReceiverInfo.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"ReceiverInfo\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String name, String phone, String province, String city, String district, String detailAddress)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"name\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"phone\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"province\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"city\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"district\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"detailAddress\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[17,4],[24,5]]}]},\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/domain/repository/FulfillmentOrderRepository.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/scf-oms/src/main/java/com/scf/oms/domain/repository/FulfillmentOrderRepository.java\",\"file_name\":\"FulfillmentOrderRepository.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"save\",\"method_parameters\":\"(FulfillmentOrder order)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"FulfillmentOrder\",\"name\":\"order\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[10,4],[10,38]]},{\"method_name\":\"findById\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String orderId)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"orderId\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[11,4],[11,56]]},{\"method_name\":\"findByExternalId\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String
